description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 형태와 의도적인 소프트웨어 아티팩트를 활용한 KURO-X의 추상적 디지털 초상화입니다. 이 작품은 하이테크 현실 속에서 구조화된 디자인과 혼란스러운 디지털 간섭의 교차점을 탐구합니다.
description.en: An abstract digital portrait of KURO-X, utilizing sharp geometric forms and intentional software artifacts. This piece explores the intersection of structured design and chaotic digital interference in a high-tech reality.

prompt: KURO-X character design, geometric glitch aesthetic, fragmented polygonal shapes, digital distortion artifacts, cybernetic motif, monochrome base with vibrant neon cyan highlights, shattered glass texture, hyper-realistic tech details, sharp edges, 8k, cinematic lighting, high contrast, futuristic data stream background.
